title: Korak 40

challengeFiles.name: main

solutions.name: main

tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output
        
    empl = Employee("Frank", "trainee")
    empl.level = "junior"
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()
        
    assert "'Frank' promoted to 'junior'." in output
    assert f"Salary updated to \${Employee._base_salaries['junior']}." in output
`) })

description:
Konačno, sada nakon što se završi seter za salary, možete ga koristiti unutar setera za level.

Promenite liniju self._salary = Employee._base_salaries[new_level] ili koristite setera za salary umesto direktne izmene svojstva elementa/polja _salary.

Dakle, radionica iz praćenja plate je završena.
